runs.promotion_probe: intentionally rejected because a required dependency was not satisfied

runs.purpose: private logic and policy receipt architecture
cross-run recursion, concurrency, privacy, and assurance synthesis

observed_kernel_limitations: The event JSONL omits full records and has no import or deterministic replay path.
JSONL is written separately from the enclosing SQLite commit and can diverge after failure.
Read operations mutate the event log.
Reports and graph exports omit parts of evidence, experiments, artifacts, and promotions.
Atom creation can set SUPPORTED directly and promotion accepts caller assertions.
The built-in Morph operation emits templates and is not strict Morph proof-search replay.
handling: The repository knowledge graph is a deterministic curated projection with explicit sources, falsifiers, experiment links, and nonclaims. Research Kernel output is discovery provenance only.
